title: Grapple Hook
description: A grapple to help you latch onto things!

# Grapple Hook
Welcome to Grapple Hook! Grapple Hook allows you to 'grapple' onto items and soar towards them!

## Crafting
To craft, simply craft an iorn pickaxe and in the middle left and right corners, place a chain block.

## Usage
First, point your cursor at the block you would like to grapple to. Then, click on your mouse, and the grapple will activate! If you get stuck at any point, simply right-click. The Grapple Hook includes 64 uses before breaking.
